title: Offline Tab Head
description: Enable heads in TAB on offline servers.
body:
Simple mod that renders heads in TAB.

Minecraft by default renders player heads when server is encrypted.
This mod just says to renderer "yo I'm on encrypted server" and that's all.

Explaining how it works for experienced users:
1. We injecting into PlayerListHud class 
2. Finding render method and invoking into "isEncrypted()" function 
3. Modifying that value to "true" always. 
Profit.
